queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of having no checking account to increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance between 0 and 200 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of elevated credit risk associated with maintaining a checking account balance between zero and 200 DM.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the mitigating impact of critical credit history or other existing credits on credit default likelihood.
